acceptance_criteria: The recursive playbook defines the common loop, stage outputs, recursion rules, and verification gates.
Each role procedure maps to a specific stage artifact and handoff.

open_questions.question: Prompt procedures remain documentation in this first pass rather than runtime agent manifests.

objective: Plan the playbook and procedure docs.
change_slices: Write strategist, architect, implementation planner, code generator, validator, and refiner procedures.
test_scenarios: The validator work item covers the docs paths changed in this slice.
Procedure docs reference the correct stage and handoff filenames.

notes: Each role procedure names exact stage outputs and guardrails.
The updated guidance now points ChatGPT sessions to auditable outputs and validation expectations.

rollout_notes: Link the procedures from README-level guidance so contributors use the same method.
